hyperedges.label: Cohesive monoline UI icon set sharing identical design tokens (16x16 viewBox, #666 fill, flat monoline style)

nodes.label: Serverless Architecture Pattern
nodes.rationale: Modern serverless approach chosen to separate the client interface from heavy processing required for syllabus extraction and schedule generation

nodes.label: System Architecture Diagram
nodes.rationale: Mermaid diagram defining the full system flow: Client UI uploads PDF to API Gateway, Orchestrator dispatches to OCR Service and LLM Provider for text extraction and structure analysis, saves state to PostgreSQL, and returns generated schedule back to the client

nodes.label: Monochromatic Terminal Aesthetic
nodes.rationale: Consistent terminal/monochromatic design system across all pages using Geist/Geist Mono/Space Grotesk fonts, zero border-radius, dark backgrounds with white accents to create a cohesive developer-terminal aesthetic
